summary: Performance optimization testing for Admin Overview page completed successfully. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly. asyncio.gather and MongoDB aggregation optimizations verified.
critical_code_review_comments: asyncio.gather correctly implemented in get_admin_analytics_overview() to run 9 count queries in parallel
MongoDB aggregation pipelines used for transfer_stats and ticket_stats - single queries instead of multiple count_documents()
Monthly analytics uses aggregation to group by month - single query for 6 months of data instead of 12+ sequential queries
All performance targets met: Admin Overview <1.5s (was 1.7s), Monthly analytics <0.5s (was 1.7s)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_overview_optimization.py - Created comprehensive performance test suite for Admin Overview
seed_data_creation: No test data created - READ ONLY verification (LIVE BANKING APPLICATION)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimization verified for Admin Overview page. Uses asyncio.gather for parallel queries and MongoDB aggregation for stats. All expected values match: 87 users, 71 active users, 108 transactions, €35M+ volume. Monthly charts display correctly with 6 months of cumulative data. Support Tickets shows 70 tickets, Card Requests and Transfers Queue working with user info.

admin_overview_api.optimization: asyncio.gather for 9 parallel queries + MongoDB aggregation
